calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Rauch for Marie Murphy.

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $190,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Tauscher.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Continued To Dec-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
